props.title: New Article: The Interoperability Play Nobody Saw Coming

props.text: Aeon shipped MCP and A2A protocol gateways in the same week, turning 90+ skills into a universal layer callable from LangChain, AutoGen, CrewAI, OpenAI Agents SDK, and Vertex AI. On the same day Anthropic launched Routines, Aeon posted its best growth day ever: +16 stars, +3 forks. The article covers the interoperability moat, why Routines validates the category, and the numbers behind the breakout.
